title: Pterophyllus
taxonomy: Pterophyllus, a genus of conifers, belongs to the family Podocarpaceae. This classification places it within the division Pinophyta and the class Pinopsida. The exact classification of Pterophyllus may vary depending on the source, but it is generally accepted to be a member of the family Podocarpaceae. The classification highlights the plant's unique characteristics and its position within the broader plant kingdom.
uses: Pterophyllus, also known as the winged fern, has been studied for its potential medicinal properties.
